case_title: CHARLES R. KAUFFMAN VS. REBECCA L. KAUFFMAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CHARLES R. KAUFFMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REBECCA L. KAUFFMAN IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED ON DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAUFFMAN, CHARLES R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAUFFMAN, REBECCA L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,486.59 FILED BY KAUFFMAN, CHARLES R. AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFFMAN, REBECCA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
